subject: Lord's Alliance
fact: The Lord's Alliance is described as the ruling castes of major city-states favoring centralized power.
source_quote: Described the Lord's Alliance as the ruling castes of major city-states, favoring centralized power

subject: Harpers
fact: The Harpers are committed to preventing any single faction from gaining full control.
source_quote: Described the Harpers as committed to preventing any single faction from gaining full control

subject: Order of the Gauntlet
fact: The Order of the Gauntlet is described as heroic, combat-focused, and morality-driven.
source_quote: Described the Order of the Gauntlet as heroic, combat-focused, and morality-driven

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: The Emerald Enclave is described as nature-preserving, druid-aligned, and internally divided.
source_quote: Described the Emerald Enclave as nature-preserving, druid-aligned, and internally divided on what "preserving nature" means

subject: Zhentarim
fact: The Zhentarim is a trade-controlling criminal organization originally a cult of an evil god.
source_quote: Described the Zhentarim (Black Network) as a trade-controlling criminal organization, originally a cult of an evil god
